name: Adamu
rules_text: Bearer of the First Flame. Adamu channels divine equilibrium; when attacked, he restores 2 health to all allied units and reflects 25% damage to attackers.
initiative_text: When defending, this unit negates the first two attacks each round. Allied units within two tiles gain +2 to morale and +1 to all checks this turn.
initiative_summary:
Celestial Initiative (12)
🛡️ Guard 6 • ⚔️ First Strike 6
Always acts first in combat. Reflects 25% damage. Cannot be stunned or delayed.
